headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self'; frame-src https:; child-src https:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'
